Off Calendar Oct-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT JON SCOTT STEVENS' MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AND FOR SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Robin Reichert, 314-9746 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant's Motion for Order Establishing Admissions is denied. Defendant has served the responses and has shown excusable neglect or mistake for not doing so in a timely manner. Prevailing party may prepare a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Notice Of Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Continued To Oct-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT JON SCOTT STEVENS MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AND FOR SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Robin Reichert, 314-9746 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Gabriel S. Levine, Esq. of Levine & Baker LLP 814-2023 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Discussed and the Court vacated its tentative ruling as plaintiff provided an updated doctor's note. The Court continued the matter to 10/13/11 at 9:00am for plaintiff to file an opposition by 10/03/11, to be personally served on defendant's counsel at his firm's office. Defendant's reply due by 10/11/11, to be e-mailed to plaintiff. All parties to lodge courtesy copies with the Department. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

RULING: Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND, NO OPPOSITION FILED.
